name: DnsResolutionRangeRecord
description: DnsResolutionRangeRecord schema from Censys Platform API

first_observed.description: When this record was first observed in this window.

ip.description: The IP of the record. IPv4 if the record_type is A. IPv6 if the record_type is AAAA. Otherwise not present.

last_observed.description: When this record was last observed in this window.

mail_server.description: The MX mail server. Only present when record_type is MX. Otherwise not present.

mname.description: The primary name server. Only present when record_type is SOA. Otherwise not present.

name_server.description: The name server. Only present when record_type is NS. Otherwise not present.

priority.description: The MX priority. Only present when record_type is MX. Otherwise not present.

record_type.description: The record type. Either A, AAAA, MX, NS, SOA, or TXT.

rname.description: The responsible contact, as email. Only present when record_type is SOA. Otherwise not present.

value.description: Full, untruncated string. Only present when record_type is TXT. Otherwise not present.
